rationale.R1.1: The output provides a detailed critique of the draft's conceptual issues and suggests revisions, which is more than just restating surface phrasing.
rationale.R1.2: The output identifies multiple logical inconsistencies and proposes specific fixes, walking through the argument chain end-to-end.
rationale.RX.1: The output clearly marks uncertainty in several claims and provides citations where necessary.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content; it only critiques existing work.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
